description_long: This is an open, aged book with yellowed, textured pages and a dark, slightly worn cover. The most striking feature is a three-dimensional cutout in the center of the open pages, forming a stepped, geometric shape that resembles a stylized object or abstract sculpture. The pages are inscribed with faint, sepia-toned text, giving the book an antique or historical appearance. The cutout runs through several layers of pages, creating a sense of depth and craftsmanship. The book's binding appears sturdy, with visible page edges and a flat, rectangular form. There are no visible illustrations or decorations on the cover or spine, and the book exudes a sense of mystery and artistry.
description: An open, antique book with yellowed pages and a deep, geometric cutout forming a stepped shape in the center. The cover is plain and dark, with faint text on the pages and no visible illustrations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open book with a prominent stepped cutout running horizontally through the center of the pages.
description_view_1: Angled left view revealing the depth and layered structure of the cutout, as well as the book's thickness and the texture of the pages.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the open book, with the cutout visible from the opposite side and the text faintly visible on the exposed page.
description_view_3: Angled right view highlighting the geometric cutout's depth and the book's slightly curved, open form.
